title: Auto-Create Dashboard Custom Link When Adding or Merging Tableau Pulse Metric
story: As a data analyst importing Tableau Pulse metrics, I want a custom link to the Pulse dashboard to be automatically created and added to the Related tab when I add or merge a Pulse metric, so that I can navigate directly to the Tableau Pulse view from the Metrics Glossary.
description:
When a user adds a Tableau Pulse metric to the glossary or merges it with an existing metric, the system automatically:

1. Retrieves the Pulse metric name and dashboard URL/ID
2. Creates a Dashboard Custom URL with the text prefixed as "Pulse: {metric name}" and the URL pointing to the Tableau Pulse dashboard
3. Adds the custom link to the Related tab automatically

This works for all four import scenarios: single add via row icon, multi-select add, multi-select merge to primary, and merge to existing metrics.
acceptance_criteria: Adding a single Pulse metric creates a custom link with 'Pulse: {name}' text
Custom link URL points to the correct Tableau Pulse dashboard
Custom link is automatically added to the Related tab
Multi-select add creates custom links for each selected metric
Merging to a primary metric creates the custom link on the primary
Merging to existing metrics creates the custom link on the target metric
ux_changes: Custom links with 'Pulse: {name}' prefix automatically appear in the Related tab after adding or merging Tableau Pulse metrics.
middleware_changes: Post-add and post-merge hooks now create a Dashboard Custom URL record and add it to the Related tab for the target metric.
implementation_notes: Four import scenarios are supported: (1) single add via + icon per row, (2) multi-select and add, (3) multi-select merge to a selected primary, (4) multi-select merge to existing metrics. All four paths create the Pulse custom link automatically.
comment_summary: Waqar implemented all four import/merge scenarios with automatic custom link creation. Screenshots provided for each flow. All tested on staging.
